title: indigofera torulosa
intro: Indigofera torulosa, also known as the Indian cluster bean, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Indigofera torulosa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
